title: Dog-friendly Movie Theater in Paris
transcript:
Who wouldn't want to watch a feel-good film with their best friend?
The Majestic Bastile, an independent movie theater in Paris, recently opened their doors to humans and their dogs.
The first film to welcome furry friends: Lady and the Tramp.
As Lady and the Tramp take you into their enchanted world.
The obedient pups took their seats on red upholstered chairs and watched the action on screen.
...
And after the film, the canines and their companions got to socialize.
This moviegoer says Lady and the Tramp is her favorite film
and is part of the reason she is passionate about dogs today.
If the tail wagging and raised ears are any indication,
then this showing was a success.
The theater says it is planning more dog-friendly showings with classic canine-forward films.
